REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 79392062) AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS, LAVONNE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KDF POST STREET LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS, LAVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1030 POST STREET #410, SAN FRANCISCO , SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94109, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79392062)
